holdings.infoBox: DUBS is an equity ETF with a total of 10 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Aptus Large Cap Enhanced Yield ETF (DUBS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively managed portfolio, providing exposure to US large-cap equities combined with an equity-linked note strategy. The objective of the fund is to provide enhanced yield. DUBS was launched on Jun 14, 2023 and is issued by Aptus Capital Advisors.
